description: Tools blocked from subagent spawning to prevent recursive delegation, user interaction, and cross-platform side effects. Based on Hermes Agent delegate_tool.py DELEGATE_BLOCKED_TOOLS.

blocked_tools.name: delegate_task
blocked_tools.reason: No recursive delegation - prevents infinite spawn loops

blocked_tools.name: sessions_spawn
blocked_tools.reason: No recursive spawning - prevents infinite spawn loops

blocked_tools.name: clarify
blocked_tools.reason: No user interaction from children - parent handles all user communication

blocked_tools.name: memory
blocked_tools.reason: No writes to shared MEMORY.md - prevents corruption from concurrent access

blocked_tools.name: send_message
blocked_tools.reason: No cross-platform side effects - parent controls all messaging

blocked_tools.name: message
blocked_tools.reason: No cross-platform side effects - parent controls all messaging

blocked_tools.name: execute_code
blocked_tools.reason: Children should reason step-by-step, not write scripts

blocked_tools.name: tts
blocked_tools.reason: No audio output from children - prevents unexpected audio

notes: Blocked tools are stripped from the toolset when spawning subagents
Max depth prevents recursive spawning beyond parent -> child -> grandchild
Max concurrent limits parallel subagents to prevent resource exhaustion
Based on Hermes Agent patterns: tools/delegate_tool.py
